symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`minor` shedding of elastomeric dust, `0.05 inch` wear). High radial vibration (`0.47` in/sec RMS) on inboard bearing pads.
root_cause: Coupling elastomeric element failure (`31%` degradation) due to operating in high ambient temperature (`93`°C) and minor angular offset (`0.008 inch`).
action_taken: Installed upgraded high-temperature urethane coupling element (`P/N 2668-C`), shimmed motor base (`0.28 inch`), and verified vibration dropped to `0.51` in/sec RMS.
parts_used: High-Temp Urethane Coupling Element, Stainless Shim Assortment Kit

symptom_description: Pump unable to maintain rated head (`15.8 PSI` drop from curve). Motor amp draw is `21%` lower than baseline (`81 Amps`).
root_cause: Normal mechanical degradation of wear rings (`0.015 inch` gap) and impeller shroud after `22220` hours of continuous high-load service.
action_taken: Swapped out worn impeller assembly (`Spec-693`), renewed casing wear rings to `0.011 inch` spec, and replaced shaft locking nut and key (`37 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Severe cavitation noise (`grinding`) detected across pump volute with suction pressure dropping by `8.3 PSI` under maximum load.
root_cause: Inlet bellmouth vortexing and turbulence caused by low liquid level (`45%` submerged) and degraded baffle plates after `22687` hours of service.
action_taken: Installed vortex suppressor baffle inside suction tank, topped off level above `68%`, and verified steady suction pressure (`+6.8 PSI`).
parts_used: Vortex Baffle Plate Assembly, Tank Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: High frequency vibration (`0.32` in/sec RMS) detected during routine condition monitoring survey on pump outboard bearing (`BPFI peak`).
root_cause: Lube oil contamination with process fluid/water (`424 ppm` moisture) caused breakdown of oil film and subsequent spalling of bearing races after `30920` hours.
action_taken: Replaced both inboard and outboard radial/thrust bearings (`P/N 7063-X`), flushed bearing housing of `384 ppm` debris, and added synthetic ISO VG 68 oil.
parts_used: SKF Outboard Angular Contact Bearing, Inboard Roller Bearing, ISO VG 68 Lube Oil

symptom_description: Acoustic emission levels spiked `12%` across thrust bearing housing. Oil sampling showed elevated iron and copper wear particles (`233 ppm`).
root_cause: Lack of lubrication following oil ring hangup inside bearing housing reservoir (`oil level dropped 0.23 inch` below minimum sight glass mark).
action_taken: Replaced damaged bearing set (`P/N 9400-REV2`), polished shaft journals (`0.007 inch` fit), and installed new constant level oiler assembly (`Spec-396`).
parts_used: Thrust Bearing Assembly, Constant Level Oiler, Oil Sight Glass

symptom_description: High axial vibration (`0.36` in/sec RMS) and abnormal phase relationship (`16%` phase shift across coupling) detected during vibration survey.
root_cause: Coupling elastomeric element failure (`60%` degradation) due to operating in high ambient temperature (`140`°C) and minor angular offset (`0.009 inch`).
action_taken: Installed upgraded high-temperature urethane coupling element (`Spec-959`), shimmed motor base (`0.08 inch`), and verified vibration dropped to `0.57` in/sec RMS.
parts_used: High-Temp Urethane Coupling Element, Stainless Shim Assortment Kit

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise (`hissing`) inside casing and high pressure drop (`23.7 PSI`) across pump discharge flange.
root_cause: High-velocity slurry impingement (`634 GPM`) eroded leading edge of impeller vanes, reducing effective outer diameter by `0.20 inch`.
action_taken: Installed heavy-duty chrome-iron impeller (`Spec-985`), renewed volute liners (`0.05 inch`), and verified rated head recovery (`+14.6 PSI`).
parts_used: Chrome-Iron Slurry Impeller, Volute Liner Set

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm (`31%` deficit). Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected. High load demand from driven equipment (MOTOR-101) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear (`0.26 inch` metal loss) on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates (`179 ppm`) over `9454` runtime hours.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller (`P/N 3171-C`) and casing wear rings, setting clearance to `0.006 inch`.
parts_used: 316SS Impeller, Casing Wear Ring, Impeller Key

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot (`83`°C) and vibrating `slight` (`0.29` in/sec RMS). Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Shaft journal scoring (`0.003 inch` taper) and improper fitting tolerance during previous overhaul allowed bearing inner race to spin on shaft.
action_taken: Re-metallized and ground shaft journal to exact tolerance (`0.011 inch`), installed new precision bearing set (`P/N 9254-REV2`), and torqued housing bolts (`73 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Bearing Journal Sleeve, Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Housing Fasteners

symptom_description: Pump making loud thumping right after morning startup. Discharge flow dropping intermittently (`48%` drop) with high casing vibration (`0.26` in/sec RMS). High load demand from driven equipment (MOTOR-101) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Inlet bellmouth vortexing and turbulence caused by low liquid level (`81%` submerged) and degraded baffle plates after `14444` hours of service.
action_taken: Installed vortex suppressor baffle inside suction tank, topped off level above `29%`, and verified steady suction pressure (`+19.0 PSI`).
parts_used: Vortex Baffle Plate Assembly, Tank Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: High axial vibration (`0.55` in/sec RMS) and abnormal phase relationship (`64%` phase shift across coupling) detected during vibration survey.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over `1 years` degraded precision laser alignment (`0.010 inch` parallel offset, `0.018 inch/10 inch` angular).
action_taken: Loosened flange bolts to relieve `151 ft-lbs` pipe strain, re-torqued baseplate hold-down bolts (`127 ft-lbs`), and completed full alignment (`0.017 inch`).

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm (`26%` deficit). Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past `8 months` eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances to `0.019 inch` (`normal < 0.012 inch`).
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly (`P/N 2888-C`), renewed front/rear wear rings (`0.017 inch` gap restored), and balanced rotor dynamically (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Elevated temperatures on both motor and pump inboard bearing housings (`91`°C) with slight humming noise (`46 Hz` frequency).
root_cause: Soft foot condition under motor baseplate (`0.014 inch` gap on right rear foot) causing structural distortion during anchor bolt torquing (`67 ft-lbs`).
action_taken: Replaced worn elastomeric coupling insert (`Spec-766`) and re-laser aligned pump/motor train to tight tolerance (`< 0.005 inch` offset).

symptom_description: Coupling bolts loosening (`slight` play) with gradual rattling (`clicking`). Temperature across coupling guard elevated to `109`°C.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over `21 months` degraded precision laser alignment (`0.008 inch` parallel offset, `0.027 inch/10 inch` angular).
action_taken: Loosened flange bolts to relieve `114 ft-lbs` pipe strain, re-torqued baseplate hold-down bolts (`67 ft-lbs`), and completed full alignment (`0.004 inch`).

symptom_description: Acoustic emission levels spiked `34%` across thrust bearing housing. Oil sampling showed elevated iron and copper wear particles (`144 ppm`).
root_cause: Thermal degradation and hardening of bearing grease (`159`°C operating environment) over `10 months`, resulting in severe metal-to-metal friction.
action_taken: Cleaned grease cavities, installed precision C3 clearance roller bearings (`Spec-786`), packed with Polyrex EM grease (`35%` fill), and verified low vibration (`0.46` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Roller Bearing Set C3, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube), Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: Severe cavitation noise (`grinding`) detected across pump volute with suction pressure dropping by `6.0 PSI` under maximum load.
root_cause: Insufficient Net Positive Suction Head Available (NPSHA) caused by partially clogged suction basket strainer (`42%` flow restriction, suction drop of `17.7 PSI`).
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer (`100-mesh`), removed `5.0 lbs` of debris, and throttled discharge valve to restore `7.3 feet` of NPSH margin.
parts_used: Suction Strainer Mesh Basket, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Loss of pump efficiency (`31%` drop) over `24 months`. High frequency flow turbulence (`0.22` in/sec RMS) measured across volute.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear (`0.12 inch` metal loss) on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates (`170 ppm`) over `10962` runtime hours.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller (`P/N 9383-X`) and casing wear rings, setting clearance to `0.016 inch`.
parts_used: 316SS Impeller, Casing Wear Ring, Impeller Key

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot (`96`°C) and vibrating `marked` (`0.51` in/sec RMS). Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Improper bearing preload and excessive axial thrust load (`28%` above design) caused premature cage fracture and rolling element skidding.
action_taken: Replaced thrust bearing housing assembly (`P/N 4403-C`), renewed oil seals, adjusted axial preload shims (`0.28 inch`), and verified dynamic balance (`0.53` in/sec).
parts_used: Radial Bearing, Thrust Bearing Set, Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm (`29%` deficit). Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past `4 years` eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances to `0.006 inch` (`normal < 0.012 inch`).
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly (`P/N 1191-X`), renewed front/rear wear rings (`0.016 inch` gap restored), and balanced rotor dynamically (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket
